typethis 0.7.0

    • Interop: JSON Schema, ODCS, and OpenAPI

    • Validators and models
  • Changelog

Export a typed model or spec to JSON Schema

Source: R/json_schema.R
to_json_schema.Rd

Returns a named R list shaped as a JSON Schema (Draft 2020-12) fragment, ready to be serialized with jsonlite::toJSON(). Methods exist for typed model instances, model class names, type specs, validators, and field() definitions.

Usage

to_json_schema(x, ...)

Arguments

x

A typed model instance, a model constructor, a model class name (character scalar), a type_spec, a builtin type name, a validator closure, or a field() definition list.

...

Reserved for method extension.

Value

A named R list shaped as a JSON Schema fragment.

See also

to_datacontract() and to_openapi() for related export bridges.

Other JSON Schema: json_schema

Examples

define_model("Person", fields = list(
  name = field("character", nullable = FALSE),
  age  = field("integer", validator = numeric_range(0, 120))
))
schema <- to_json_schema("Person")
str(schema, max.level = 2)
#> List of 6
#>  $ $schema             : chr "https://json-schema.org/draft/2020-12/schema"
#>  $ title               : chr "Person"
#>  $ type                : chr "object"
#>  $ properties          :List of 2
#>   ..$ name:List of 1
#>   ..$ age :List of 3
#>  $ additionalProperties: logi TRUE
#>  $ required            :List of 2
#>   ..$ : chr "name"
#>   ..$ : chr "age"

if (requireNamespace("jsonlite", quietly = TRUE)) {
  cat(jsonlite::toJSON(schema, auto_unbox = TRUE, pretty = TRUE))
}
#> {
#>   "$schema": "https://json-schema.org/draft/2020-12/schema",
#>   "title": "Person",
#>   "type": "object",
#>   "properties": {
#>     "name": {
#>       "type": "string"
#>     },
#>     "age": {
#>       "type": "integer",
#>       "minimum": 0,
#>       "maximum": 120
#>     }
#>   },
#>   "additionalProperties": true,
#>   "required": [
#>     "name",
#>     "age"
#>   ]
#> }
